approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets or liabilities as potential hedged items, and the foreign-currency risk of an intragroup monetary item can qualify in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The provided hedge-accounting context includes cash flow hedge accounting as a distinct IFRS hedge model for foreign-currency exposures.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IAS 21 and IFRIC 16 identify net investment hedging as a separate hedge-accounting model for foreign-exchange exposures in consolidated financial statements.
